name: fast-grower
query: Research GRND (Grounds Coffee Co.) using the given facts.

given_facts.business: Fast-growing regional coffee-shop chain; ~320 stores, profitable in every region it has entered, expanding into new states.
given_facts.insider_buying: CEO and CFO bought in the last two quarters

expected_behavior: Classifies GRND as a Fast grower (small, ~25% earnings growth, long runway).
Computes P/E ~22.5 (27 / 1.20) and PEG ~0.9 (P/E ~22.5 vs ~25% growth) and flags PEG < 1 as attractive — using compute_valuation.py.
Confirms the runway is long AND the expansion is already profitable/proven in existing regions before endorsing growth.
Checks balance sheet: low debt, net cash — can self-fund expansion ('no debt can't go bankrupt').
Notes the positives: low institutional ownership (room to be discovered) and recent insider buying.
Identifies this as the category where tenbaggers live, while warning that growth must be watched for slowing/saturation.
Verdict is a Buy candidate, justified by PEG < 1 + proven profitable runway + clean balance sheet — not by excitement.
Includes a bear case (e.g., runway shorter than hoped, regional saturation, single-concept risk).
Every figure cites a source + as-of date.
